title: succisa pratensis var. subacaulis
intro: Succisa pratensis var. subacaulis, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant that belongs to the honeysuckle family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Wood Betony include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, astringent, and antispasmodic, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its capacity to relieve headaches, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Wood Betony can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the skin to reap its medicinal benefits.
